description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the fpco/stack-build:latest Docker image and a global before_script that adds the Mono repository key, writes the Mono apt sources, runs apt-get update and installs make, xz-utils, libmono-2.0-dev, fsharp and libglib2.0-dev, sets STACK_ROOT to the .stack directory, runs stack setup and installs only dependencies with stack install --only-dependencies. Define a single job named build in the default test stage that caches the directories _cache and .stack-work. In the build job run the commands: stack build --test clr-typed, stack build clr-typed-demo, stack build clr-win-linker, stack build --test clr-import-gen, stack build --test clr-inline, stack build --bench clr-inline, and finally stack exec clr-typed-demo. No additional services, artifacts, or branch rules are required.
